vulnerabilities.description: process_user_command(alice, "logout") is called on line 22 after delete_user(alice) freed alice on line 14, dereferencing a freed pointer.
delete_user(alice) is called a second time on line 26 after alice was already freed on line 14, causing a double free of the same User pointer.

cross_function.description: main frees alice via delete_user (line 14) then passes the dangling pointer to process_user_command (line 22), which dereferences user->username on a freed object.
main calls delete_user(alice) twice (lines 14 and 26), triggering free() on the same pointer twice inside delete_user.
